_meta.description: Verified BMFFFL champion records 2020-2025. Cross-referenced across: season archives (2020.mdx, 2022.mdx, 2024.mdx, 2025.mdx), standings-history.json, champion-timeline-2020-2025.mdx, bmfffl-fact-check-2026-03.md.
_meta.validationStatus: VERIFIED — consistent across all internal sources
_meta.note: Live Sleeper API verification for 2025 standings pending (task-571)

champions.notablePlayer: Alvin Kamara (6 TDs on Christmas Day)
champions.consistencyCheck: VERIFIED — consistent across 2020 season archive, standings-history.json, champion-timeline, and all-time records article
champions.notes: Only championship decided by under 5 points until 2025's 0.94pt 3rd place game

champions.consistencyCheck: VERIFIED — consistent across standings-history.json and champion-timeline. 2021 season archive not yet written but champion claim corroborated by multiple other sources.
champions.notes: MLSchools12's first championship in 5 seasons. CMC trade from 2020 was foundational.

champions.consistencyCheck: VERIFIED — consistent across 2022 season archive, standings-history.json, champion-timeline. rbr was runner-up for 2nd consecutive year (2021-2022).
champions.notes: Grandes won as 4th seed in a three-way 10-4 tie season. Won semifinal over MLSchools12 by 2.80 points.

champions.consistencyCheck: VERIFIED — consistent across standings-history.json, champion-timeline. 2023 season archive not yet written but champion claim corroborated by multiple sources.
champions.notes: JuicyBussy won as 6th seed (lowest-seeded champion in BMFFFL history). 13-1 MLSchools12 lost in semis.

champions.consistencyCheck: VERIFIED — consistent across 2024 season archive, standings-history.json, champion-timeline.
champions.notes: MLSchools12's second championship. Won from 3rd seed — the only non-1st-seed championship for them. Tubes94 went 11-3 but lost in semis.

champions.consistencyCheck: VERIFIED — consistent across 2025 season archive, standings-history.json, champion-timeline. 13-1 MLSchools12 lost in semis for the second time.
champions.notes: Narrowest regular season game on record: 0.94-point 3rd place differential. tdtd19844 won as 4th seed, matching Grandes' 2022 upset.
champions.sleeperVerificationNote: Champion claim requires Sleeper API verification against 2025 league (task-571). Internal data is consistent but live confirmation pending.

validationSummary.internalConsistency: All 6 champion claims are consistent across season archives, standings-history.json, and champion-timeline article
validationSummary.pattern: 4th-seed upsets won 2 of 6 championships (Grandes 2022, tdtd19844 2025). 1st seed won 1 (MLSchools12 2021, as seed 1). 2025 was only season where 4th seed beat the eventual champion.
